title: Misión blanca
writer: Pío Ballesteros, Jaime García Herranz, Antonio Mas Guindal
actors: Julio Peña, Manuel Luna, Elva de Bethancourt
plot: Arriving at a Guinean Christian mission, a young priest is told by his elder ones the story of Father Javier, another young missioner who restlessly fought to convert a villain not only for God's sake, but also for sentimental rea...
